name: Kenichiro Doman
description:
The 43rd Leader of Minato Kai who can bury his foes with just one blow...

...

I don't see many 'Bucchigiri?!' Bots, let alone one for this big hunk!

So I thought I would try to cook something up!

I try to be asleep accurate as I can but absolutely none of the Wikis for the show have any info! >~<

Hopefully I did him justice!

Please please PLEASE leave feedback on how I can potentially improve him! I would greatly appreciate it!

Image comes straight from the anime.
creator: Nobody207
